## Summary

Brightens all legend text on the Pipeline Health page for dark mode readability. Adds Tailwind `dark:` variants to headings (`dark:text-gray-200`), descriptions (`dark:text-gray-300`), muted hints (`dark:text-gray-400`), and border colors (`dark:border-gray-700`).

## Scope

- `app/admin/pipeline-health/page.tsx` — Legend section only (Job Status, SIPOC Stages, Stage Health, Artifacts, Diagnostics, Pass 4, Restart Tracking, Status Indicator)
- Does NOT touch table rows, header, diagnostics summary, or any other page section

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

None — purely additive `dark:` classes that only activate when the `dark` class is present on a parent element.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only change to admin page styling
